title: Regression Models with Time Series Error Terms Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of modeling a time series regression where the residuals exhibit serial correlation, requiring ARIMA modeling.
elements: Fit Standard Linear Regression Model (Y_t = β_0 + β_1X_t + e_t)
Final Model: Y_t = β_0 + β_1X_t + φ⁻¹(B)θ(B)a_t
Forecast Y using both Regression and ARIMA components
relationships: Process starts with Original Time Series Data which is used to Fit Standard Linear Regression Model
The residuals from this model are Analyzed for serial correlation
If Residuals are White Noise, the standard regression model is sufficient
If not, the Residuals are identified and modeled as an ARIMA(p,d,q) process
This leads to the Final Model which combines the regression and time series components
The final step is to Forecast Y using this integrated model
